speaker: speaker1
text: Do you like watching the Winter Olympic Games ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Of course . It's the tradition game in winter , and with good reason . Don't you like watching it ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Of course I do . I love it . All the games are exciting and the competitors are respectable .

speaker: speaker2
text: That's true . For various reasons , it takes more to hold a fierce game for Winter Olympics than it does for Summer Olympics . You know , the low temperature may cause many problems .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yeah . What's the difference between the Winter Olympics and the Summer Olympics ?

speaker: speaker2
text: When the Olympic Games started in modern times , only summer events were included . When it grew popular , there came the Winter Olympic Games , which includes a variety of winter sports .

speaker: speaker1
text: I see . Then , what's your favorite winter sport ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Figure skating . In my eye , nothing beats it .

speaker: speaker1
text: Then you must know Shen Due and Hao Hongbo .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , I didn't expect you to know them . But yes , I love them not only because of many medals they've won , but also because of many medals they've won , but also because of their spirits .

speaker: speaker1
text: You should go to talk with May . She is a big fan of them too .
